northstar.title: Become a professional software developer
northstar.description: Ship reliable code, grow core CS skills, and land a strong first role in tech.

quarters.title: Y1 Q1: Plan & foundations

months.title: Finish strong in math & English; explore free coding intro (software)
Pick a language (Python or JS); complete a structured beginner module (software)
Build a tiny CLI or web page project; share with a mentor (software)

quarters.title: Y1 Q2: Build & practice

months.title: Research CS/IT programs; list application deadlines (software)
Study for SAT/ACT; block weekly practice (software)
Apply to colleges or bootcamps; request recommendation letters (software)

quarters.title: Y1 Q3: Ship & reflect

months.title: Deepen data structures basics; solve 3 problems/week (software)
Contribute to open source or a class team project (software)
Prepare internship applications; polish resume & GitHub (software)

quarters.title: Y1 Q4: Accelerate

months.title: Internship or part-time: ship features; collect feedback (software)
Expand portfolio with 2 shipped projects (software)
Interview practice: behavioral + one technical round weekly (software)

quarters.title: Y2 Q1: Plan & foundations

months.title: Take advanced coursework or certs aligned to stack (software)
Lead a project milestone; document architecture decisions (software)
Network: coffee chats & local meetups (software)

quarters.title: Y2 Q2: Build & practice

months.title: Specialize (web, mobile, or backend); pick learning roadmap (software)
Mock interviews; refine stories with metrics (software)
Capstone or senior project with demo video (software)

quarters.title: Y2 Q3: Ship & reflect

months.title: Negotiate offers; compare growth not only salary (software)
Onboard strong: docs, tooling, code review habits (software)
Ship small wins in production; seek mentorship (software)

quarters.title: Y2 Q4: Accelerate

months.title: Own a feature end-to-end (software)
Performance & testing fundamentals (software)
Mentor an intern or junior teammate (software)

quarters.title: Y3 Q1: Plan & foundations

months.title: Grow T-shaped skills: one adjacent domain (software)
Present work at a meetup or internal demo (software)
Plan next role level: scope & leadership (software)

quarters.title: Y3 Q2: Build & practice

months.title: Deepen system design; read real postmortems (software)
Refine long-term specialty; set 2-year goals (software)
Give back: OSS, teaching, or interviewing (software)

quarters.title: Y3 Q3: Ship & reflect

months.title: Sustain learning habit; balance health & craft (software)
Finish strong in math & English; explore free coding intro (software)
Pick a language (Python or JS); complete a structured beginner module (software)

quarters.title: Y3 Q4: Accelerate

months.title: Build a tiny CLI or web page project; share with a mentor (software)
Research CS/IT programs; list application deadlines (software)
Study for SAT/ACT; block weekly practice (software)

quarters.title: Y4 Q1: Plan & foundations

months.title: Apply to colleges or bootcamps; request recommendation letters (software)
Deepen data structures basics; solve 3 problems/week (software)
Contribute to open source or a class team project (software)

quarters.title: Y4 Q2: Build & practice

months.title: Prepare internship applications; polish resume & GitHub (software)
Internship or part-time: ship features; collect feedback (software)
Expand portfolio with 2 shipped projects (software)

quarters.title: Y4 Q3: Ship & reflect

months.title: Interview practice: behavioral + one technical round weekly (software)
Take advanced coursework or certs aligned to stack (software)
Lead a project milestone; document architecture decisions (software)

quarters.title: Y4 Q4: Accelerate

months.title: Network: coffee chats & local meetups (software)
Specialize (web, mobile, or backend); pick learning roadmap (software)
Mock interviews; refine stories with metrics (software)

quarters.title: Y5 Q1: Plan & foundations

months.title: Capstone or senior project with demo video (software)
Negotiate offers; compare growth not only salary (software)
Onboard strong: docs, tooling, code review habits (software)

quarters.title: Y5 Q2: Build & practice

months.title: Ship small wins in production; seek mentorship (software)
Own a feature end-to-end (software)
Performance & testing fundamentals (software)

quarters.title: Y5 Q3: Ship & reflect

months.title: Mentor an intern or junior teammate (software)
Grow T-shaped skills: one adjacent domain (software)
Present work at a meetup or internal demo (software)

quarters.title: Y5 Q4: Accelerate

months.title: Plan next role level: scope & leadership (software)
Deepen system design; read real postmortems (software)
Refine long-term specialty; set 2-year goals (software)

northstar.title: Become a licensed healthcare professional (e.g., RN)
northstar.description: Complete prerequisites, clinical training, licensure, and your first role in patient care.

quarters.title: Y1 Q1: Foundations

months.title: Science & GPA focus: biology, chemistry basics (healthcare)
Volunteer at clinic or hospital; log hours (healthcare)
Research nursing/premed pathways; shadow a shift (healthcare)

quarters.title: Y1 Q2: Clinical skills

months.title: Test prep; strengthen communication skills (healthcare)
Apply to programs; financial aid & scholarships (healthcare)
Complete prerequisites with labs (healthcare)

quarters.title: Y1 Q3: Licensure & transition

months.title: CPR/BLS certification; health screenings (healthcare)
Interview for nursing or allied health programs (healthcare)
Begin program: fundamentals of patient care (healthcare)

quarters.title: Y1 Q4: Impact & growth

months.title: Clinical skills labs; dosage calculations (healthcare)
Clinical rotations: document reflections (healthcare)
Prepare for NCLEX or board exams (healthcare)

quarters.title: Y2 Q1: Foundations

months.title: Pass licensure; apply to new grad residencies (healthcare)
First role: time management on the floor (healthcare)
Preceptorship goals; seek feedback (healthcare)

quarters.title: Y2 Q2: Clinical skills

months.title: Specialty exploration: ICU, ED, pediatrics (healthcare)
Evidence-based practice: small QI project (healthcare)
Certifications (ACLS, PALS) as needed (healthcare)

quarters.title: Y2 Q3: Licensure & transition

months.title: Mentor peers; join professional association (healthcare)
Charge nurse or lead tasks; leadership shadow (healthcare)
Continuing education plan; CEU tracking (healthcare)

quarters.title: Y2 Q4: Impact & growth

months.title: Work-life sustainability; burnout prevention (healthcare)
Patient advocacy project (healthcare)
Teaching or precepting interest (healthcare)

quarters.title: Y3 Q1: Foundations

months.title: Career ladder: certifications & roles (healthcare)
Research or community health outreach (healthcare)
Policy awareness: healthcare trends (healthcare)

quarters.title: Y3 Q2: Clinical skills

months.title: Public health volunteer work (healthcare)
Long-term specialty certification path (healthcare)
Reflect on impact; set 5-year care goals (healthcare)

quarters.title: Y3 Q3: Licensure & transition

months.title: Balance compassion with boundaries (healthcare)
Celebrate progress; renew license & goals (healthcare)
Science & GPA focus: biology, chemistry basics (healthcare)

quarters.title: Y3 Q4: Impact & growth

months.title: Volunteer at clinic or hospital; log hours (healthcare)
Research nursing/premed pathways; shadow a shift (healthcare)
Test prep; strengthen communication skills (healthcare)
